/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Http.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/Http.dir/http/response.c.o CMakeFiles/Http.dir/http/request.c.o CMakeFiles/Http.dir/http/status.c.o CMakeFiles/Http.dir/http/content.c.o CMakeFiles/Http.dir/log/ascii.c.o CMakeFiles/Http.dir/log/stdout.c.o -o Http
